reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
Front desk staff at times not helpful . Only 2 washing sets and 2 lifts available

Building old too.

reviews.title: Great value for huge room
reviews.positives: This hotel is great value - I got a huge room with good views for little money. The staff are helpful and the breakfast was good. There were free clothes washing and drying machines for guests.
reviews.negatives: Nothing major. The lifts are a slow so you often have to wait a bit.

reviews.title: Hot springs shower!
reviews.text: Fuzhou is a busy city. You can go to major tourist attractions via Metro. It's also easy to hire a cab or ride-share DiDi. The hotel has natural hot springs. A plus. The staff is friendly and helpful. The breakfast is very good. The bathroom is newly renovated. We had a very comfortable stay there

reviews.title: Good location, close to many restaurants and friendly staff!
reviews.positives: Staffs were friendly, proactively offering advice on local attractions; got a room upgrade and gave us one day free breakfast!

reviews.title: Spacious Room
reviews.room_type: Family-friendly Family Room（Hot Springs+high-altitude City Scenery）

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The rooms are clean, beds and pillows are very comfortable.  I am impressed by the fact that the hotel provides free of charge laundry room.  If I have known sooner, I would not have brought so much clothes for my visit.
reviews.negatives: The breakfast spread, particular grains an cereals, can have more selections.

reviews.title: 飯店位置好,明亮乾淨!
reviews.text: 整體住宿體驗很棒,下次來還會入住~

reviews.title: Best hotel ive stayed so far
reviews.positives:
Location is very convenient. It is near Sanfang Qixiang (Three lanes and seven alleys). You can easily go there by bus. They have bus stops just infront of the hotel. 
Also near the moon bridge, about 20-30 mins away by didi (taxi)
They also offer free use of laundry and dryer machine which is very usefull. Nice City view and friendly staff. Delicious Breakfast buffet
Staff at the reception also uses translator device so they can easily communicate with foreign guest 😊
But the staff in the laundry area can speak English. He was very helpful

reviews.title: Awesome room design
reviews.positives:
It was clean, and I loved the room's design. The staff was extremely kind and helpful. 

It is walking distance (15 mins or so) to sanfang qixiang.

reviews.title: Bon hôtel confortable situé non loin des zones touristiques
reviews.positives: Hôtel confortable. Chambre spacieuse. Grandes fenêtres. Salle de bain moderne. Situé à 25' à pieds du quartier ancien très touristique.
reviews.negatives: Le Personnel ne parle pas anglais. Difficile de se faire commander un taxi.

reviews.title: Très bien
reviews.positives: Le petit déjeuner

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Tolles luxuriöses Hotel mit allem, was man braucht. Ich fand mein Zimmer toll. Groß, soviel Platz für Dinge abzulegen, inkl. Frühstück. Das Bett war auch bequem, das Badezimmer großartig! Freie Getränke im Kühlschrank. Sogar waschen kann man umsonst :-D. Eigentlich kann man nicht mehr erwarten. Ich würde immer wieder kommen :-).
reviews.negatives: Das Preis-Leistungsverhältnis ist ok... Man bekommt in Fuzhou auch günstigere Unterkünfte, die genauso schön sind. Aber das Mercure ist natürlich eine internationale Kette, deshalb der Preis.

reviews.title: ミニマルモダンな都市型ホテル
reviews.positives: 無駄が無く全てが機能的。冷蔵庫のドリンクも無料なので追加精算不要。朝食は中国式メニュー豊富。もちろん部屋も十分広く快適。コスパはとても良いです。
reviews.negatives: エレベーターが二基しか無いので時間帯によってはなかなか来ない。

reviews.title: 機能的
reviews.positives: 清潔かつ機能的で、冷蔵庫の中の飲料が無料なので、精算の手間も省ける。
reviews.negatives: エレベーターが二基しかないので、朝は渋滞する。

reviews.title: 早餐多樣，員工培訓需加強，離三坊七巷近
reviews.positives: 地點
reviews.negatives: 入住時間無法準時，員工素質不ㄧ

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: 網路上房價總價，與入住價格有差異，多出稅金及服務費另人不解。

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: 早餐有點弱，其他不說，麵包真不行。

reviews.title: 大致還好
reviews.positives: 意外的溫泉
reviews.negatives: 早晚溫差問題導致中央空調無法自行調整，導致房間內悶熱，最後飯店解決方式就是打開窗戶享受微弱自然風

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: 乾淨

reviews.title: 賓至如歸，了解需求後主動介紹附近景點，二次入住時主動升等，房間位置離電梯口最近
reviews.positives: 服務人員親切，主動、熱情

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: 酒店距离三坊七巷不远，相对方便~床也挺舒服。我们本来预订的双床房有下水管道的臭味，反应之后酒店服务人员马上给我们换房处理，挺好的~

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: 房间非常干净，

reviews.title: 方便，快捷，
reviews.positives: 人员服务，清洁，位置

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Hersey Mükemmel

reviews.title: OK in general.
reviews.positives:
1. It is close to the subway exits (with escalator available)
2. The room is spacious. 
3. you can find lots of restaurants within 20-min walking distances.
reviews.negatives:
1. The window glass is all too dirty.
2. The elevator is only to the 28th floor while the restaurant for breakfast is on the 29th floor. So think twice if you are oldies or rely heavily on wheelchair.

reviews.title: Very comfortable stay. The rooms and facilities were excellent and the staff provided exceptional service.
reviews.positives: Staff were very helpful. It was in a good location and very clean
reviews.negatives: We would have liked more western options for breakfast, maybe something like oats or museli. The room we were in didn’t have a door between the bed and the bathroom. That made it hard because we had a baby in a cot who woke up everytime we used the toilet or shower.

reviews.title: I’ll choose this hotel again in future visit
reviews.positives: Very near to metro line 1, walking distance to 3 lane 7 alley and hot spring park
